creator: catone@cpan.org
text:
Patch approved.

On Thu, Jan 29, 2009 at 9:40 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of net/p5-XML-RPC,
>
> Please note that PR ports/131096 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131096
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Regards, Denis.
